subcodes.first_line: God willing, through heavenly bounty, on this spiritual day thou shalt partake of the choice wine of inner meanings and engage in the remembrance of the Desired One of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت سبحانی در این یوم روحانی از رحیق معانی بیاشامی و بذکر مقصود عالم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
